description: Collapsible form section with a title header, optional description, and a body area for grouping related form fields.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Section heading displayed in the header.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional description text below the heading.

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true, the section header is clickable and can collapse the body.

parameters.name: CollapsedByDefault
parameters.description: When true and Collapsible is true, the section starts collapsed.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Basic form section
examples.code:
<TmFormSection Title="Personal Information" Description="Enter your basic details.">
    <TmFormField Label="Name"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
    <TmFormField Label="Email"><input type="email" /></TmFormField>
</TmFormSection>

examples.title: Collapsible section, collapsed by default
examples.code:
<TmFormSection Title="Advanced Settings" Collapsible="true" CollapsedByDefault="true">
    <TmFormField Label="API Key"><input type="text" /></TmFormField>
</TmFormSection>
